title: Sim: industry-wide price movement
summary: Move three products together through three price points in lock-step.
oce_text:
[sim_db]
excel = "model.xlsx"

[["cs::sim_lock_step"]]
scenarios = ["base"]
measures = "share|revenue"

["cs::sim_lock_step".scenario_chgs.ProductA]
price = [9.0, 10.0, 11.0]

["cs::sim_lock_step".scenario_chgs.ProductB]
price = [14.0, 15.0, 16.0]

["cs::sim_lock_step".scenario_chgs.ProductC]
price = [12.0, 13.0, 14.0]

title: Sim: lock-step filtered to a product subset
summary: Move only two of three products; the third stays at baseline.
oce_text:
[sim_db]
excel = "model.xlsx"

[["cs::sim_lock_step"]]
scenarios = ["base"]
measures = "share|revenue"
product_names = ["ProductA", "ProductB"]

["cs::sim_lock_step".scenario_chgs.ProductA]
price = [9.0, 10.0, 11.0]

["cs::sim_lock_step".scenario_chgs.ProductB]
price = [14.0, 15.0, 16.0]

["cs::sim_lock_step".scenario_chgs.ProductC]
price = [5.0, 6.0, 7.0]
